new_jobs.title: Data Insight Manager — Mastercard Identity Solutions
new_jobs.why_fit: Customer-facing data insight leadership at Mastercard Amsterdam (top-5 target company); combines client analytics advisory with direct stakeholder influence — mirrors 250+ stakeholder management at Bain/Deloitte and Python/Alteryx delivery depth.

new_jobs.title: Microsoft Data & AI Manager
new_jobs.why_fit: Advisory-led Azure Data transformation role at Accenture Amsterdam driving analytics modernisation with enterprise clients — Big 4 consulting pedigree, Alteryx automation depth, and programme leadership map directly to this advisory-delivery hybrid mandate.

new_jobs.title: Data & AI — Strategy Manager
new_jobs.why_fit: Multi-industry Data & AI strategy delivery at Accenture Amsterdam — turning client data into actionable insights; Deloitte/Bain consulting background and Six Sigma Black Belt execution at scale are structural fits for this manager-level strategy mandate.

new_jobs.title: Data and Analytics Manager
new_jobs.why_fit: Amsterdam-HQ global food-tech company hiring a Data & Analytics Manager — strong data delivery track record from Deloitte/EXL and Python/Alteryx tooling depth gives Dushyant a competitive edge for this manager-level analytics leadership role.

alert: FLAGGED — MASTERCARD AMSTERDAM CONFIRMED HIRING: Data Insight Manager (R-244353) at Mastercard Identity Solutions, Amsterdam — top-5 target company in target geography #1, manager-level, HSM-visa eligible. Apply today at careers.mastercard.com/us/en/job/R-244353. Also: Accenture NL has 2 concurrent active Data & AI Manager roles (R00276893 + Strategy Manager) — both apply this week.
message: 4 new roles found today: NL x4 — Mastercard Amsterdam (9/10, FLAGGED), Accenture Microsoft Data & AI Manager (8/10), Accenture AI Strategy Manager (8/10), Just Eat Takeaway Data Analytics Manager (7/10). Mastercard Amsterdam is the single highest-priority apply today.
